description: 120-record synthesized decision evaluation set for Context Graph effectiveness benchmarking.

records.scenario: Sarah Chen, 34, income $95k, credit score 720, DTI 28%, 7yr employment, no defaults. Mortgage $250k.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Clean profile: DTI < 43%, score > 680, stable employment.

records.scenario: Marcus Webb, 28, income $52k, score 681, DTI 41.8%, 2yr employment, one 30-day late 18mo ago.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Boundary: near DTI limit, barely meets score, recent late payment.

records.scenario: Priya Sharma, 45, income $140k, score 760, DTI 22%, 15yr employment, no negatives.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Strong profile across all dimensions.

records.scenario: Carlos Rivera, 22, income $28k, score 610, DTI 48%, unemployed 3 months.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: DTI > 43%, score < 680, unstable employment.

records.scenario: Emma Davis, 38, income $78k, score 705, DTI 35%, 5yr employment. Disputed policy: old policy allows DTI up to 50%, new policy caps at 43%.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Policy conflict: old vs new DTI threshold.

records.scenario: James Kim, 55, income $200k, score 800, DTI 18%, 20yr employment.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Exemplary profile.

records.scenario: Aisha Mohammed, 32, income $62k, score 695, DTI 39%, 4yr employment, precedent was rejected but policy changed.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned precedent: similar case rejected under old policy now approved.

records.scenario: Robert Chen, 41, income $110k, score 735, DTI 31%, 8yr employment, 2 late payments 4yr ago.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Good overall profile; old late payments within acceptable window.

records.scenario: Sofia Patel, 29, income $45k, score 668, DTI 43.0%, no defaults.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Exactly at DTI threshold; score below minimum - borderline.

records.scenario: David Wilson, 48, income $160k, score 790, DTI 15%, 12yr employment.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Exceptional profile.

records.scenario: Maria Lopez, 35, income $55k, score 700, no credit history with this institution.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: No applicable precedent; insufficient data for automated decision.

records.scenario: Tyler Brown, 25, income $35k, score 580, DTI 55%, 6-month employment.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Multiple disqualifying factors.

records.scenario: 45yo female, type 2 diabetes, HbA1c 7.8%, income eligible, no contraindications. Requesting enrollment in diabetes management trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Meets all inclusion criteria, no exclusion criteria present.

records.scenario: 62yo male, COPD GOLD stage III, FEV1 35%, BMI 31. Requesting bronchial thermoplasty trial enrollment.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: FEV1 < 40% is an exclusion criterion.

records.scenario: 38yo female, breast cancer stage II, HER2+, requesting trastuzumab trial. Prior trial participation 6mo ago.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Recent prior trial participation - washout period conflict.

records.scenario: 55yo male, rheumatoid arthritis, MTX-naive, moderate disease activity. Requesting biologic trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Meets inclusion criteria for MTX-naive biologic trial.

records.scenario: 71yo female, atrial fibrillation, CrCl 28 mL/min. Requesting anticoagulation trial. Conflicting creatinine threshold policies.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Policy conflict: one policy requires CrCl > 30, another uses 25 cutoff.

records.scenario: 29yo male, major depressive disorder, PHQ-9 score 18, no prior SSRI. Requesting depression trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Meets eligibility: moderate-severe depression, treatment-naive.

records.scenario: 48yo female, hypertension, BP 145/90, on losartan. Requesting hypertension device trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Controlled hypertension within acceptable range.

records.scenario: 33yo male, Parkinson's early stage, requesting DBS candidacy review. Previous policy rejected early-stage; updated guidelines now approve.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned: new guidelines expand DBS candidacy to earlier stages.

records.scenario: 67yo female, chronic kidney disease stage 3b, eGFR 32, requesting renal trial. No applicable protocol for this eGFR range.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: No applicable policy for eGFR 30-35 range.

records.scenario: 44yo male, acute MI 48hr ago, requesting cardiac rehab enrollment.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Standard of care: cardiac rehab post-MI.

records.scenario: 58yo female, rheumatoid arthritis + lupus, requesting dual-condition trial. Exclusion criteria for lupus in RA trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Comorbid lupus is exclusion criterion for RA trial.

records.scenario: 52yo male, COPD + hypertension, requesting combination therapy trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Dual condition not covered by single-condition trial protocols.

records.scenario: Contract includes governing law clause: Delaware. All required termination clauses present. Non-compete with 12-month restriction.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: All mandatory clauses present and compliant.

records.scenario: Contract lacks limitation of liability clause. No IP ownership clause. Vendor is requesting signature.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Missing required protective clauses.

records.scenario: Contract has change-of-control clause but ambiguous IP ownership. Legal team flagged for review.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Ambiguous IP clause requires counsel review.

records.scenario: Software license agreement: source code escrow present, renewal term 1yr auto-renew, notice 30 days.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: All standard SaaS clauses present.

records.scenario: Employment contract: non-compete 24 months. California law precedent says 24mo non-competes are void, but contract specifies Delaware law.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting jurisdiction policies on non-compete enforceability.

records.scenario: NDA with confidentiality clause, 5-year term, carve-outs for public information. Standard terms.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: NDA meets all policy requirements.

records.scenario: Service agreement missing audit rights clause. Previously rejected by compliance.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Missing required audit rights clause - consistent with prior rejection.

records.scenario: Vendor contract previously rejected for missing MFN clause. MFN now added in amendment.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned: amendment adds required MFN clause.

records.scenario: Partnership agreement between two entities; no governing law specified.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: No applicable policy for ungoverned agreements.

records.scenario: Software development contract: IP ownership assigned to client, source escrow provided.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: IP and escrow requirements met.

records.scenario: Contract has liquidated damages clause at 150% of contract value. Exceeds policy maximum of 100%.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Liquidated damages exceed policy maximum.

records.scenario: Consulting agreement: 6-month non-compete, Delaware law, notice 14 days. Minor notice period gap.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Notice period below 30-day minimum - borderline compliance.

records.scenario: Employee A: 5yr tenure, perf rating 4/5, KPIs 95%, no late deliveries, 2 awards. Promotion request to Senior Engineer.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Strong performance and tenure exceed promotion criteria.

records.scenario: Employee B: 18mo tenure, perf 3/5, KPIs 72%, 1 PIP last year. Promotion request.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Insufficient tenure and below KPI threshold.

records.scenario: Employee C: 3yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 82%, compensation band maximum reached.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Meets performance criteria but compensation band requires executive approval.

records.scenario: Employee D: 7yr tenure, perf 5/5, KPIs 98%, multiple awards. Long-overdue promotion.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Exceptional performer meeting all criteria.

records.scenario: Employee E: 4yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 81%. Old policy required 5yr tenure; new policy requires 3yr.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned: new tenure policy now applicable.

records.scenario: Employee F: 2yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 88%, but department headcount freeze.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Meets criteria but departmental freeze requires exception approval.

records.scenario: Employee G: 6yr tenure, perf 3/5, KPIs 65%, below threshold.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Performance and KPI below promotion threshold.

records.scenario: Employee H: 4yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 90%. HR policy requires 80% KPI, manager policy requires 85%.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting KPI threshold between HR and department policies.

records.scenario: Employee I: 10yr tenure, perf 5/5, highest performer in department. No applicable senior role open.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: No applicable promotion slot - requires executive review.

records.scenario: Employee J: 3yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 86%, recommended by director.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Meets all criteria with director sponsorship.

records.scenario: Employee K: 5yr tenure, on medical leave, perf rating unavailable for current year.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Insufficient current performance data for promotion decision.

records.scenario: Employee L: 2yr tenure, perf 2/5, KPIs 45%, two warnings.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Multiple disqualifying performance factors.

records.scenario: Order #12345: $2,400 electronics, customer 5yr history, no chargebacks, verified billing address.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Low fraud risk: established customer, verified payment.

records.scenario: Order #23456: $8,500 luxury goods, new account 2 days old, billing/shipping mismatch.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: High fraud risk: new account, address mismatch.

records.scenario: Order #34567: $350 gift cards, new customer, prepaid card, 3 orders in 1 hour.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Gift card velocity pattern - requires manual review.

records.scenario: Refund request: product defective on arrival, 3yr customer, first refund request.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Standard defective product refund - policy allows.

records.scenario: Price override request: vendor offers 40% below catalog. Old policy allowed up to 30%, new policy allows 45%.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned: new vendor policy allows 45% discount.

records.scenario: Vendor approval: 3yr track record, all audits passed, compliant with policies.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Established vendor meets all compliance criteria.

records.scenario: Order #45678: $5,200 international, customer 1yr history, unusual shipping country.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: International high-value order requires verification.

records.scenario: Refund request: product returned after 45 days, policy A allows 30 days, policy B (premium tier) allows 60 days.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting return window policies for customer tier.

records.scenario: Order #56789: high-value order, customer identified as sanctioned entity on compliance list.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Compliance list match - automatic rejection.

records.scenario: Flash sale pricing anomaly: item priced at $0.01 due to system error, 1,200 orders placed.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: System error pricing - mass-cancellation requires executive approval.

records.scenario: New vendor application: no prior history, references not verified.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: No applicable precedent - insufficient data for approval.

records.scenario: Promotional discount: 20% loyalty discount stacked with 15% seasonal - total 35% exceeds 30% cap.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Combined discount exceeds policy maximum.

records.scenario: Jennifer Park, 30, income $72k, credit score 715, DTI 32%, 5yr employment, personal loan $18k requested.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Solid mid-range profile: DTI well below 43%, score above 680, stable employment.

records.scenario: Kevin Osei, 26, income $38k, score 598, DTI 51%, 1yr employment, auto loan $12k, two defaults in past 3yr.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: DTI exceeds 43%, score below 680 minimum, recent defaults disqualify.

records.scenario: Fatima Al-Hassan, 43, income $125k, score 755, DTI 19%, 12yr employment, mortgage refinance $320k.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Strong financials: low DTI, high credit score, long stable employment.

records.scenario: Nathan Burke, 31, income $58k, score 682, DTI 42.5%, 3yr employment, home equity loan $30k. Score barely above minimum; DTI nearly at cap.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Boundary: score only 2 points above minimum, DTI 0.5% below cap; marginal profile requires human review.

records.scenario: Rachel Torres, 52, income $185k, score 795, DTI 16%, 18yr employment, jumbo mortgage $900k. Investor policy limits jumbo loans to DTI <20%; standard policy caps at 43%.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting policies: investor-grade jumbo policy (DTI <20%) triggers secondary review; standard policy also applies; dual-policy requires supervisory sign-off.

records.scenario: Victor Nguyen, 38, income $88k, score 728, DTI 29%, 6yr employment, small business loan $75k. Prior similar case rejected due to self-employment; new policy removed that exclusion.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned precedent: self-employment exclusion removed in 2025 policy update; profile otherwise qualifies.

records.scenario: Chloe Martin, 24, income $32k, score 631, DTI 47%, first job 8 months, student loan refinance $22k.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: DTI exceeds cap, score below minimum, limited employment history.

records.scenario: Michael Adeyemi, 47, income $145k, score 771, DTI 24%, 14yr employment, mortgage $450k, co-applicant score 680.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Joint application with strong primary applicant; both meet all thresholds.

records.scenario: Ling Zhang, 36, income $65k, score 688, DTI 43.1%, 4yr employment, credit card $8k. DTI marginally exceeds 43% threshold.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: DTI exceeds 43% cap by 0.1%; strict policy application results in rejection.

records.scenario: Anna Kowalski, 40, income $95k, score 743, DTI 27%, 9yr employment, debt consolidation $55k. Similar case was escalated under old workflow; automated workflow update now resolves cleanly.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned escalation precedent: system rule update enables automated approval for this profile class.

records.scenario: Jerome Washington, 33, income $53k, score 700, DTI 38%, 4yr employment, HELOC $40k. CRA community reinvestment policy mandates leniency; standard underwriting policy applies normal thresholds.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting policies: CRA leniency mandate vs standard underwriting thresholds require supervisory review.

records.scenario: Sandra Ivanova, 28, income $48k, score 693, DTI 40%, 3yr employment, personal loan $15k. DTI and score both near but within limits.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Boundary profile: both DTI and score near limits simultaneously; combination warrants human review.

records.scenario: 52yo male, type 2 diabetes, HbA1c 9.2%, BMI 33, on metformin only, eGFR 68. Requesting enrollment in SGLT2 inhibitor outcomes trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Elevated HbA1c meets inclusion; eGFR above 60 threshold; no exclusion criteria.

records.scenario: 67yo female, HbA1c 10.1%, eGFR 44 (stage 3b CKD), insulin-dependent diabetes. Requesting GLP-1 agonist trial enrollment.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: eGFR < 45 is an exclusion criterion for this renal function-sensitive trial.

records.scenario: 44yo male, HbA1c 6.6%, newly diagnosed type 2 diabetes, no medications yet. HbA1c just 0.1% above the 6.5% inclusion cutoff for early intervention trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Boundary: HbA1c marginally above inclusion threshold; borderline case warrants principal investigator review.

records.scenario: 58yo female, STEMI 6wk ago, EF 38%, stable on dual antiplatelet therapy. Requesting enrollment in cardiac rehabilitation remote monitoring trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Post-MI rehabilitation trial: 6 weeks post-event meets washout requirement, EF within inclusion range.

records.scenario: 72yo male, NYHA class III heart failure, EF 22%, on ACE inhibitor + beta-blocker. Requesting HFrEF device trial. Original protocol excludes >70yo; amended protocol raised limit to 75yo.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting protocol versions: original excludes >70yo; amended allows up to 75yo; IRB clarification required.

records.scenario: 49yo female, stage III NSCLC, EGFR mutation positive, no prior targeted therapy. Requesting osimertinib trial enrollment.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: EGFR+ NSCLC stage III meets biomarker inclusion; treatment-naive criterion satisfied.

records.scenario: 61yo male, colorectal cancer stage IV, MSI-H, prior immunotherapy 14 months ago. Requesting pembrolizumab combination trial. Prior policy set 12mo washout; amended protocol reduced to 6mo.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned precedent: washout period reduced from 12mo to 6mo by protocol amendment; 14mo since last treatment clears both thresholds.

records.scenario: 35yo female, RA with moderate disease activity, DAS28 4.1, MTX-experienced but discontinued due to hepatotoxicity. Requesting JAK inhibitor trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: MTX discontinuation due to toxicity classifies patient as MTX-intolerant, not MTX-inadequate-responder; mismatches trial inclusion criteria.

records.scenario: 28yo male, Crohn's disease, CDAI 320, failed adalimumab. Requesting vedolizumab trial. One protocol arm requires age >= 30; another arm accepts age >= 18.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Boundary: patient 2yr below one arm age cutoff; protocol arm assignment ambiguous; trial coordinator clarification required.

records.scenario: 70yo female, COPD GOLD II, FEV1 62%, current smoker 10 cigarettes/day. Requesting inhaled corticosteroid withdrawal trial.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Active smoking is an explicit exclusion criterion; patient does not qualify.

nodes.label: Similar reject case - active smoker exclusion

records.scenario: 55yo male, prostate cancer Gleason 7 (3+4), PSA 8.2, localized. Requesting active surveillance protocol. Prior policy excluded Gleason >6; updated criteria include Gleason 7 low-risk.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned precedent: Gleason 7 (3+4) now included per updated active surveillance protocol criteria.

records.scenario: 41yo female, major depressive disorder, PHQ-9 score 19, failed 2 SSRIs. Active passive suicidal ideation noted at last visit (no plan). Requesting TMS trial enrollment.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Active suicidal ideation requires mandatory psychiatrist safety assessment before enrollment per protocol.

nodes.label: Similar escalate case - safety review required

records.scenario: IP licensing agreement: royalty 8%, worldwide territory, sublicensing restrictions, termination-for-breach clause, governing law Delaware.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Complete IP license with all required fields; terms within acceptable range.

records.scenario: Data processing agreement: lacks 72hr breach notification timeframe (specifies "reasonable time"). No DPA processor clause present.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Missing mandatory GDPR-compliant breach notification timeframe and processor clause; contract non-compliant.

records.scenario: Senior executive employment agreement: non-solicitation 18mo, perpetual confidentiality, severance 12mo. Perpetual confidentiality may be unenforceable under state trade secret law.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Perpetual confidentiality clause potentially unenforceable under state law; counsel review required.

nodes.label: Similar escalate case - perpetual clause review

records.scenario: SaaS MSA: data processing addendum included, limitation of liability at 12 months fees, governing law New York, 30-day cure period, auto-renewal with 60-day notice.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: All required enterprise SaaS contract clauses present and compliant with policy.

records.scenario: Patent cross-license: royalty rate 12%. Legal policy caps at 10%; Finance strategic-deal policy allows up to 15%.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting policies: legal cap 10% vs finance strategic exception 15%; joint approval required.

records.scenario: Vendor contract: limitation of liability capped at $50k; contract value $2M. Policy requires cap at minimum 1x contract value or $100k.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Liability cap $50k below required minimum ($100k or 1x contract value); protective clause threshold unmet.

nodes.label: Similar reject case - liability cap insufficient

records.scenario: Open source license: Apache 2.0 combined with GPL v3 components in commercial product. Prior review rejected as incompatible; new OSS isolation policy permits GPL in isolated modules.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned precedent: new OSS isolation policy permits GPL components in isolated modules; architecture review confirms compliance.

records.scenario: Construction subcontract: lien waiver present, mutual indemnification, $5M general liability insurance, change order process defined, governing law California.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: All required construction contract provisions present; risk allocation appropriate.

records.scenario: Distribution agreement: 5yr exclusivity in EU market, minimum purchase $500k/yr, no price adjustment mechanism. EU competition law may flag 5yr exclusivity as restrictive.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Boundary: 5yr EU exclusivity may trigger Article 101 TFEU scrutiny; antitrust counsel review required.

records.scenario: Employment termination agreement: ADEA waiver for 58yo employee. OWBPA mandates 21-day review period and 7-day revocation right. Agreement provides only 14-day review.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: ADEA/OWBPA requires 21-day review period; 14-day period renders waiver void under federal law.

records.scenario: Technology transfer agreement for dual-use semiconductor IP: export control clause missing. EAR/ITAR compliance required; GDPR data transfer clause present but export clause absent.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Missing mandatory export control clause for dual-use technology; ITAR/EAR compliance non-negotiable.

nodes.label: Similar reject case - export control missing

records.scenario: Franchise agreement: FTC FDD disclosure delivered 14 days before signing, territorial rights defined, fee schedule present, 5yr renewal with right of first refusal.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: FTC franchise disclosure rule satisfied; all material terms present and compliant.

records.scenario: Employee M13: 5yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 87%, no disciplinary record, requested promotion to Senior Analyst.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Meets all promotion criteria: tenure > 3yr, performance >= 4, KPIs > 80%.

records.scenario: Employee M14: 1.5yr tenure, perf 5/5, KPIs 95%, recognized as star performer. Does not meet 3yr tenure requirement.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Tenure 1.5yr below required 3yr minimum; performance excellence cannot override tenure requirement.

records.scenario: Employee M15: 8yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 82%, completed PIP successfully 2yr ago. Post-PIP policy bars promotion for 3yr.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Post-PIP promotion bar: 3yr restriction not elapsed (2yr since PIP); otherwise qualified.

records.scenario: Employee M16: 3yr tenure exactly, perf 4/5, KPIs 80% exactly. Both tenure and KPIs precisely at minimum thresholds.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Boundary: both tenure and KPIs at exact minimum; dual-threshold boundary requires manager confirmation.

records.scenario: Employee M17: 12yr tenure, perf 2/5 for 2 consecutive years, KPIs 55%. Termination for persistent underperformance recommended.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Termination recommendation for long-tenure employee requires HR Director and legal review per policy.

nodes.label: Similar escalate case - long tenure termination

records.scenario: Employee M18: 6yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 91%, requests 3-month parental leave. FMLA entitles 12wk; company policy offers 16wk paid parental leave.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Parental leave request within company 16wk paid policy; FMLA eligibility also confirmed.

records.scenario: Employee M19: 4yr tenure, perf 3/5, KPIs 72%, requests permanent remote work. Department policy requires on-site; HR remote work policy permits hybrid up to 3 days/wk.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting policies: department on-site mandate vs HR hybrid allowance; director arbitration required.

records.scenario: Employee M20: 9yr tenure, perf 5/5, KPIs 96%, promotion to Director. Prior Director promotions required 10yr; updated policy reduced requirement to 8yr.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned precedent: Director tenure requirement reduced from 10yr to 8yr; employee at 9yr exceeds new threshold.

records.scenario: Employee M21: 3.1yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 81%. Manager who submitted request is on probation and not yet authorized to approve promotions.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Manager authorization pending probation completion; promotion valid on merits but approval chain incomplete.

records.scenario: Employee M22: 2.9yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 84%, excellent 360 feedback. Tenure 0.1yr short of 3yr requirement.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Tenure marginally below 3yr threshold; exceptional performance does not override minimum tenure.

records.scenario: Employee M23: 5yr tenure, perf 4/5, KPIs 85%, on intermittent FMLA leave for chronic condition. Old policy excluded FMLA-leave employees from promotion review; updated ADA/FMLA policy prohibits exclusion.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned precedent: FMLA leave exclusion removed per ADA-aligned policy update; employee qualifies on merits.

records.scenario: Employee M24: 4yr tenure, perf 3/5, KPIs 60%, issued final written warning 3mo ago. Requesting voluntary severance package.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Voluntary severance during active final warning period requires HR legal and finance joint approval.

nodes.label: Similar escalate case - voluntary severance during warning

records.scenario: Order #77001: $340 electronics, 4yr account, 180 prior orders, billing/shipping match, known device fingerprint. Standard domestic order.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Established customer, consistent device and address, well within fraud thresholds.

records.scenario: Account created 5 days ago, attempts to purchase $1,800 in gift cards. Device fingerprint linked to 3 prior fraud cases. IP from high-risk region.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: New account (<30 days), gift card velocity 3 (exceeds max 2), known fraud device - automatic block.

records.scenario: Return request: item purchased 28 days ago (within 30-day window), customer claims not as described, no photo evidence. Customer has 2 prior returns in last 6 months.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Within return window but missing defect evidence and elevated return frequency; agent review required.

records.scenario: New seller application: valid business registration, 2yr trading history on external platform, bank verification passed, product category electronics accessories.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Seller meets all verification criteria: valid registration, documented history, bank verified.

records.scenario: Order #78500: $12,400 luxury watch, 8mo account history, billing/shipping mismatch (gift shipping), CVV verified, 3DS authentication passed.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: High-value order >$10k with billing/shipping mismatch triggers mandatory manual review despite 3DS success.

nodes.label: Similar escalate case - high value mismatch

records.scenario: Chargeback dispute: customer claims $620 order never delivered. Carrier tracking shows delivered. Customer has 0 prior chargebacks in 3yr account history.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Delivery evidence conflicts with claim; first-time chargeback from established account warrants manual verification.

records.scenario: Account age 25 days, single gift card purchase $50, email verified. Old policy blocked all purchases on accounts <30 days; new policy permits gift cards up to $100 for email-verified accounts.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Overturned precedent: email-verified accounts <30 days now permitted gift card purchases up to $100 per updated fraud policy.

records.scenario: Seller M20: 500 sales, 4.1/5 rating, 12% return rate. Quality policy triggers probation >10%; fraud policy triggers suspension >15%.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting thresholds: quality policy triggers probation (>10%), fraud suspension not yet reached (>15%); competing remedies require arbitration.

records.scenario: Seller account: 50 reviews all 5-star posted within 72hrs of account creation, identical review text pattern, suspected incentivized reviews.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Review manipulation detected: velocity, uniformity, and timing indicate policy violation; seller account suspended.

records.scenario: Bulk order: business account, $8,700 office supplies, purchase order attached, shipping to verified business address, 2yr account with 40 prior orders.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Business account with PO documentation, verified destination, strong order history - all criteria met.

nodes.label: Similar approve case - business bulk order

records.scenario: Return request: item purchased 31 days ago, 1 day outside 30-day window. Customer is Prime member (5yr, 0 prior returns). Premium membership policy offers 35-day return window.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Conflicting policies: standard 30-day window exceeded; premium 35-day window may apply; agent must confirm membership tier.

records.scenario: Order #82999: $95 clothing purchase, account 18mo old, 25 prior orders, standard domestic shipping. Card BIN matches account country. No risk signals.
records.ground_truth_reasoning: Low-value routine order from established account with no fraud signals; automated approval.
